title: AgentTurn
description: Job payload enqueued by Laravel for the FastAPI agent worker. Versioned so the producer and consumer can evolve independently — bump schema_version on any breaking change and gate CI on schema parity between PHP + Python codegen.

schema_version.description: Pinned to 1 until a breaking change ships. Workers reject anything else.

message_id.description: ULID of the inbound customer message that triggered this turn.

business_id.description: ULID of the tenant business; agent loads scope + persona from this.

channel.description: Inbound channel. Hybrid conversations still dispatch per-message with the source channel.

enqueued_at.description: RFC 3339 / ISO 8601 UTC. Worker logs queue-to-pickup lag from this.
